para1: Hi, I'm Taylor, wife, mom of five, and a true creative homebody. I started sharing our home journey because I believe beautiful spaces don't have to be expensive, and real life doesn't have to be perfect to be worth sharing.
para2: Whether I'm refreshing a room on a budget, testing a new weeknight recipe, or sharing our latest family adventure, my goal is to bring approachable design and practical inspiration straight to your feed.
para3: I'm here for affordable styling, honest DIYs, and the kind of everyday homemaking that actually fits real life. No gatekeeping, no aesthetic-only accounts. Just a real home and a real family.
